title: Job Control Management in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/jobcontrol' directory contains 'ControlledJob.java' and 'JobControl.java'. 'ControlledJob.java' manages job lifecycle and state, interacting with Hadoop for submission. 'JobControl.java' oversees multiple 'ControlledJob' instances, tracking states, and managing submission. Both use Java collections, logging, and Hadoop-specific classes. This system ensures efficient, controlled execution of MapReduce jobs, enhancing Hadoop's robustness and reliability.
